2544.one_line_summary: ENS wildcard resolution for subdomains via parent resolver fallback.
2544.notes: Introduces optional ExtendedResolver interface for flexible name resolution.

2569.one_line_summary: Save and retrieve SVG images on-chain for tokens.
2569.notes: Solves image storage by leveraging compact SVG format; supports ERC-20/721/1155.

2612.one_line_summary: ERC-20 permit extension allowing approvals via EIP-712 signatures.
2612.notes: Enables signature-based allowance without separate approve transaction.

2615.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for rental and mortgage functions via lien/user roles.
2615.notes: Separates ownership/user/lien-holder roles for property-like NFTs.

2645.one_line_summary: Hierarchical deterministic wallet derivation path for Layer-2 ZK solutions.
2645.notes: Specifies BIP43-compatible derivation path with grinding algorithm for L2 keys.

2678.one_line_summary: EthPM v3 package manifest format for smart contract distribution.
2678.notes: Defines JSON schema for contract packages including sources, compilers, deployments.

2680.one_line_summary: Standard layout for Ethereum 2 wallet and keystore storage.
2680.notes: Defines directory structure for both hierarchical and non-hierarchical stores.

2746.one_line_summary: Rules engine interface for hierarchical rule evaluation on data domains.
2746.notes: Enables no-code users to create RuleTrees via predefined actions.

2767.one_line_summary: Contract ownership governance standard using ERC-20 token voting power.
2767.notes: Minimal interface for ERC-20 based governance replacing ERC-173 ownership.

2770.one_line_summary: Meta-transaction forwarder contract for ERC-712 signature verification.
2770.notes: Status: Withdrawn - singleton implementation deemed not requiring standardization.

2771.one_line_summary: Protocol for recipients to accept meta-transactions via trusted forwarders.
2771.notes: Defines isTrustedForwarder discovery and _msgSender extraction from calldata.

2848.one_line_summary: My Own Messages (MOM) - decentralized message board using self-send transactions.
2848.notes: Notarizes message multihashes via transaction data; supports ADD/UPDATE/REPLY/ENDORSE operations.

2876.one_line_summary: Deposit contract interface and address format encoding with 8-byte ID.
2876.notes: Enables deposits to single contract with differentiation via encoded nonce/checksum.

2917.one_line_summary: Staking reward calculation standard based on productivity and time.
2917.notes: Standardizes on-chain interest accrual without off-chain computation.

2942.one_line_summary: EthPM URI scheme for identifying registries, packages, and contract assets.
2942.notes: Single-string representation for EthPM assets across chains and registries.
